zh.lifeSummary: 當James Fitzgerald於1460年出生在愛爾蘭時，他的父親Thomas FitzGerald 7th Earl of Desmond41歲，母親Baroness of Desmond Ellice de Barry29歲。他於1480年與Margaret Maud O'Brian在愛爾蘭庫迪 克萊爾結婚。他們至少是1個女兒的父母。他去世於1487年12月7日在愛爾蘭蒙斯特享年27歲，埋葬在愛爾蘭。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当James Fitzgerald于1460年出生在爱尔兰时，他的父亲Thomas FitzGerald 7th Earl of Desmond41岁，母亲Baroness of Desmond Ellice de Barry29岁。他于1480年与Margaret Maud O'Brian在爱尔兰庫迪 克萊爾结婚。他们至少是1个女儿的父母。他去世于1487年12月7日在爱尔兰蒙斯特享年27岁，埋葬在爱尔兰。

nameMeanings.name: Fitzgerald
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Irish Brendan, Eamon, Liam, Aidan, Bridgid, Caitlin, Donal, Fitz, Fitzgerald, Ciaran, Colum, Dermot.

Irish: from Anglo-Norman French fi(t)z ‘son’ (see Fitz ) + the personal name Gerald (see Gerald ), ‘son of Gerald’. This is a very common Anglo-Norman name in Ireland, where it has been Gaelicized as Mac Gearailt. Irish bearers of the name claim descent from Gerald Fitzwalter de Windsor, constable of Pembroke Castle in the early 12th century, whose grandson Raymond (or Redmond) ‘le Gros’ FitzGerald (died after 1185) led the invasion of Ireland on behalf of Strongbow in 1170. A branch of the family held the title Knight of Glin from at least 1299–2011.

variants.name: Jarrell
meanings: English (Kent and Middlesex; of Norman origin): variant of Jarrold, itself a variant of Gerald .

variants.name: Fitz
meanings: English: from Anglo-Norman French fi(t)z ‘son’ (from Latin filius), used originally to distinguish a son from a father bearing the same personal name and then conventionalized as a hereditary surname, or short for a surname of which fiz ‘son’ was the first element, for example Fitzhenry and Fitzroy .
German: from a vernacular pet form of the personal name Vinzenz (see Vincent ) or Vitus (see Vito , compare Veit ). Compare also Fietz .

nameMeanings.name: James
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: form of the name borne in the New Testament by two of Christ's disciples, James son of Zebedee and James son of Alphaeus. This form comes from Late Latin Iacomus, a variant of Iacobus, Latin form of Greek Iakobos. This is the same name as Old Testament Jacob (Hebrew Yaakov), but for many centuries now they have been thought of in the English-speaking world as two distinct names. In Britain, James is a royal name that from the beginning of the 15th century onwards was associated particularly with the Scottish house of Stewart: James I of Scotland ( 1394–1437 ; ruled 1424–37 ) was a patron of the arts and a noted poet, as well as an energetic ruler. King James VI of Scotland ( 1566–1625 ; reigned 1567–1625 ) succeeded to the throne of England in 1603 . His grandson, James II of England ( 1633–1701 ; reigned 1685–8 ) was a Roman Catholic, deposed in 1688 in favour of his Protestant daughter Mary and her husband William of Orange. From then on he, his son (also called James), and his grandson Charles (‘Bonnie Prince Charlie’) made various unsuccessful attempts to recover the English throne. Their supporters were known as Jacobites (from Latin Iacobus), and the name James became for a while particularly associated with Roman Catholicism on the one hand, and Highland opposition to the English government on the other. Nevertheless, it has since become one of the most perennially popular boys' names.

en.lifeSummary: When James Fitzgerald was born in 1460, in Ireland, his father, Thomas FitzGerald 7th Earl of Desmond, was 41 and his mother, Baroness of Desmond Ellice de Barry, was 29. He married Margaret Maud O'Brian in 1480, in County Clare, Ireland. They were the parents of at least 1 daughter. He died on 7 December 1487, in Munster, Ireland, at the age of 27, and was buried in Ireland.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque James Fitzgerald est né en 1460, à Irlande, son père, Thomas FitzGerald 7th Earl of Desmond, avait 41 ans et sa mère, Baroness of Desmond Ellice de Barry, avait 29 ans. Il a épousé Margaret Maud O'Brian en 1480, à County Clare, Irlande. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fille. Il est décédé le 7 décembre 1487, à Munster, Irlande, à l’âge de 27 ans, et a été enterré à Irlande.

de.lifeSummary: Als James Fitzgerald 1460 in Irland geboren wurde, war sein Vater Thomas FitzGerald 7th Earl of Desmond 41 und seine Mutter Baroness of Desmond Ellice de Barry 29. Er hat 1480 in County Clare, Irland Margaret Maud O'Brian geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Tochter. Er starb am 7. Dezember 1487 im Alter von 27 Jahren in Munster, Irland und wurde in Irland begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando James Fitzgerald è nato il nel 1460 nel Irlanda, il suo padre, Thomas FitzGerald 7th Earl of Desmond, aveva 41 anni e il suo madre, Baroness of Desmond Ellice de Barry, aveva 29 anni. Lui sposato Margaret Maud O'Brian nel 1480, nel County Clare, Irlanda. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlia. Morì il 7 dicembre 1487, nel Munster, Irlanda, all'età di 27 anni, e fu sepolto a Irlanda.

ja.lifeSummary: James Fitzgeraldが1460年にアイルランドで生まれた時，父Thomas FitzGerald 7th Earl of Desmondは41歳，母Baroness of Desmond Ellice de Barryは29歳であった。1480年にアイルランドコウントイ クラーでMargaret Maud O'Brianと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の娘の親であった。彼は1487年12月7日にアイルランドムンスターで27歳で死去し，アイルランドにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: James Fitzgerald(이)가 1460년 아일랜드에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Thomas FitzGerald 7th Earl of Desmond(은)는 41세였고, 그의 어머니 Baroness of Desmond Ellice de Barry(은)는 29세였다. 그는 1480년 아일랜드 카운티 클래르에서 Margaret Maud O'Brian(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1487년 12월 7일 아일랜드 먼스터에서 27세의 나이로 사망했으며 아일랜드에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando James Fitzgerald nasceu em 1460, em Irlanda, seu pai, Thomas FitzGerald 7th Earl of Desmond, tinha 41 anos e sua mãe, Baroness of Desmond Ellice de Barry, tinha 29 anos. Ele casou-se com Margaret Maud O'Brian em 1480, em County Clare, Irlanda. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filha. Ele faleceu em 7 de dezembro de 1487, em Munster, Irlanda, com 27 anos, e foi sepultado em Irlanda.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда James Fitzgerald родился в 1460 г. в местности Ирландия, его отцу по имени Thomas FitzGerald 7th Earl of Desmond было 41 год, а матери, которую звали Baroness of Desmond Ellice de Barry, 29. Он женился на женщине по имени Margaret Maud O'Brian в 1480 г. в местности коунти клар, Ирландия. У них была по крайней мере 1 дочь. Он умер 7 декабря 1487 г. в местности мунстир, Ирландия в возрасте 27 лет и был похоронен в местности Ирландия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando James Fitzgerald nació en 1460, en Irlanda, su papá, Thomas FitzGerald 7th Earl of Desmond, tenía 41 años y su mamá, Baroness of Desmond Ellice de Barry, tenía 29 años. Se casó con Margaret Maud O'Brian en 1480, en County Clare, Irlanda. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hija. Murió el 7 de diciembre de 1487, en Munster, Irlanda, a la edad de 27 años, y fue sepultado en Irlanda.
